calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Continued To Feb-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Sapiro for Martha Allen.

Mr. Sapiro stated that the reason they requested instruction one way or the other is to avoid later concerns raised by the beneficiaries. The Court informed Counsel that his Client needs to decide whether or not to proceed with the claims, that they can either file a petition asking the Court to instruct his Client not to proceed or they can eliminate any reference in the order as to those claims. The accounting petition was continued to February 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status. If by then something different is filed, the matter can proceed accordingly.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Continued To Jul-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Alabaster for Martha Allen (Executor).

Mr. Alabaster stated that the petition for final distribution could be filed within 60-days. Status on filing of the petition was continued to July 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Continued To May-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daivd Sauers for Martha Allen.

Mr. Sauers stated that they have the accounting completed through January of 2014, that the accounting was difficult due to enormous amounts of transactions in the securities accounts at Wells Fargo, that the Beneficiaries living in Europe are now represented by Attorney Holger Siegwart, that he was informed by Mr. Siegwart that there is an inheritance tax under German law and that he is waiting to here from Mr. Siegwart with regard to the tax issue. Mr. Sauers also stated that he may do a petition for preliminary distribution (said petition if any is to be filed by May 14, 2014). Status on filing of petition for final distribution was continued to May 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Continued To Feb-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Martha Allen (Executor).

Mr. Sauers stated that the accounting is not on file, that his firm had to take over the accounting, that they brought the accounting through October, that the stocks have been liquidated and that they have to calculate the German inheritance tax for two of the Beneficiaries which is to be paid by the Estate pursuant to the terms of the will. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution was continued to February 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The petition is to be filed by February 18, 2014.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Martha Allen (Executor).

Mr. Sauers stated that the Executor is working on preparing the accounting, that she is working with an Accountant and that they plan to have the accounting on file by the end of November. Status on filing of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to December 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
